title: Rory's Vanilla Fundamentals
description: A great modpack for optimization and other necessary features that everybody needs.
body:
This modpack has all of the essential optimization, quality of life, and other experience-improving mods that you'll ever need. It doesn't matter who you are or what you do, this modpack is great for everyone!

This lightweight modpack is guaranteed to improve your game's performance. It also has many features that 100% vanilla Minecraft lacks. This mod is basically an Optifine alternative, with more features.

But wait, there's more! There's many shaders built in, as well as resource packs.

This was mostly made to help those who want to improve their game, but don't want to manually download every single mod.
